x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules about who qualifies for the credit.

Comment:
Examples:
Must have active account
Minimum age requirement
Good credit history
Minimum balance maintained

x-enumeration-literals.name: Amount and Limit Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules about how much can be credited.

Comment:
Examples:
Maximum cashback $100 per month
Credit limit up to $10,000
Bonus capped at 5,000 points

x-enumeration-literals.name: Timing Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules about when credit is posted.

Comment:
Examples:
Credited monthly
Credited within 7 working days
Credited at maturity

x-enumeration-literals.name: Calculation Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules explaining how the credit amount is calculated.

Comment:
Examples:
1% of eligible spending
Interest rate × daily balance
Fixed $20 bonus

x-enumeration-literals.name: Condition-Based Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Credit happens only if certain conditions are met.

Comment:
Examples:
Minimum $500 spending required
No overdue payments
Account must remain open for 90 days

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expiry and Validity Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines how long the credited value remains valid.

Comment:
Examples:
Bonus valid for 12 months
Cashback must be used within 6 months

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules allowing the bank to reverse credit.

Comment:
Examples:
Refund transactions reverse cashback
Fraudulent activity voids rewards

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Regulatory and contractual obligations.

Comment:
Examples:
Subject to bank policy
Subject to regulatory approval
